zh.Dudley, West Midlands, England - Dudley: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利杜德利 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juilana Bampton ,heiress於大約1095年出生在英國戴文巴普頓時，她的父親Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire21歲，母親Emmengarde19歲。她於大約1115年與William de Paynell結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1165年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Of, Bampton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文巴普頓
zh-hans.Dudley, West Midlands, England - Dudley: 英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利杜德利 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juilana Bampton ,heiress于大约1095年出生在英国戴文巴普頓时，她的父亲Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire21岁，母亲Emmengarde19岁。她于大约1115年与William de Paynell结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1165年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the places so called, such as Bampton (Oxon, Devon, Westm), Kirkbampton (Cumb), and Bempton (ER Yorks).

variants.name: Banton
meanings: English (West Midlands): variant of Bampton, a habitational name from one or more of the places so called.

nameMeanings.name: Juilana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Juilana Bampton ,heiress was born about 1095, in Bampton, Devon, England, her father, Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire, was 21 and her mother, Emmengarde, was 19. She married William de Paynell about 1115. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1165, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juilana Bampton ,heiress est née environ 1095, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Emmengarde, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William de Paynell environ 1115. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1165, dans sa ville natale.

de.Dudley, West Midlands, England - Dudley: Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Juilana Bampton ,heiress um 1095 in Bampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire 21 und ihre Mutter Emmengarde 19. Sie hat um 1115 William de Paynell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1165 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juilana Bampton ,heiress è nata il circa 1095 nel Bampton, Devon, England, sua padre, Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Emmengarde, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William de Paynell circa 1115. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1165, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Juilana Bampton ,heiressが約1095年にイギリスデボンバンプトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshireは21歳，母Emmengardeは19歳であった。約1115年にWilliam de Paynellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1165年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.Dudley, West Midlands, England - Dudley: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Juilana Bampton ,heiress(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 데폰 바프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmengarde(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1115년 William de Paynell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juilana Bampton ,heiress nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Emmengarde, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Paynell aproximadamente 1115. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1165, em sua cidade natal.

ru.Dudley, West Midlands, England - Dudley: дудли кастл, дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juilana Bampton ,heiress родилась около 1095 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Emmengarde, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Paynell около 1115 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1165 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juilana Bampton ,heiress nació aproximadamente 1095, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Emmengarde, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William de Paynell aproximadamente 1115. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1165, en su pueblo.
